title: Descriptors
description: The descriptive layer attached to a product: highlights, Q&A pairs, use cases, intent tags, and competitive differentiators. All fields are optional — a partially populated descriptors object is conformant. Descriptors attach at the product level only in v0.1; variant-level descriptors are out of scope.

highlights.description: Standalone descriptive claims about the product.

qa_pairs.description: Pre-answered questions a shopper might ask.

use_cases.description: Concrete situations the product is suited to.

intent_tags.description: Shopping-intent tags drawn from the companion taxonomy at `taxonomy/shopping_intents.json` (version `2026-05-18`). Values SHOULD use the namespaced wire form `<dimension>:<value>` (e.g. `decision_phase:research`). Open vocabulary; clients MUST tolerate unknown values.

differentiators.description: Comparative claims positioning the product against alternatives.
